# Core dependencies
asyncio
grpcio>=1.50.0
grpcio-tools>=1.50.0

# Database
tinydb>=4.7.0

# Cryptography
cryptography>=3.4.8

# Data processing
pandas>=1.3.0
numpy>=1.21.0

# Standard library dependencies (included with Python)
# - sys
# - time
# - threading
# - hashlib
# - base64
# - ast
# - random
# - collections
# - subprocess

# Note: The following are generated files and don't need to be installed:
# - project4_pb2.py
# - project4_pb2_grpc.py
# - pbft_pb2.py
# - pbft_pb2_grpc.py
# - transactions_pb2.py
# - transactions_pb2_grpc.py
